//: E15 slice 5 — Lighthouse mobile performance budget, enforced in CI.
The bar is the v2 requirement (NFR-1 / M-18-02): mobile LCP under 2.5s on
throttled 4G. Visitors reach this app standing in a ferry queue on a phone,
often on a weak signal, so the mobile-throttled number is the real one.
Runs against a LOCAL production build, never the live site: a CI job that
measures production would fail on someone else's traffic spike and would
block a PR for a reason the author cannot act on.
numberOfRuns 3 + median aggregation because Lighthouse is noisy in CI.
Flakiness is handled by taking the median, NOT by loosening the budget.

settings.//: NO desktop preset — it would override the mobile emulation and throttling below, and we would be measuring a laptop while calling it a phone budget.
